title: React Native Brownfield CLI config
description: Configuration for the Brownfield packaging commands.

$schema.description: JSON Schema reference for editor tooling.

variant.description: Android build variant, for example debug or freeRelease.

configuration.description: Explicit iOS scheme configuration to use. This value is case sensitive.

scheme.description: Explicit iOS Xcode scheme to use.

target.description: Explicit iOS Xcode target to use.

exportExtraParams.description: Custom parameters passed to xcodebuild during archive export.

exportOptionsPlist.description: Export options plist file name used for archiving.

destination.description: iOS build destinations, such as simulator, device, or custom xcodebuild destination strings.

archive.description: Create an Xcode archive for the iOS build.

installPods.description: Whether CocoaPods should be installed automatically. Set to false to match --no-install-pods.

newArch.description: Whether to use the new React Native architecture. Set to false to match --no-new-arch.

local.description: Force a local iOS build with xcodebuild.
